title: verbena officinalis var. macrostachya
intro: Verbena officinalis var. macrostachya, also known as large-flowered vervain, is a perennial herb belonging to the verbena family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties, which help to treat various health issues such as wounds, fever, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Verbena officinalis var. macrostachya include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of colds and flu. This plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, making it a versatile herb for herbal medicine and home remedies.
